title: Manipal University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Manipal University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!
